g.title: harness
g.text: The design harness — a governed judge ↔ maker loop
You set the bar once; the loop grinds toward it and only calls you on a real fork

g.title: maca
g.text: Optimises the WORST quality + the deltas — never the sum.
Rejects any pass that drops a quality below best-so-far (no A-breaks-B).
The 'after' is always a real render of real HTML — never an AI dream.
